summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaaS platform with multi-tenant restaurant management system. Tested super admin functionality, restaurant admin capabilities, staff management, billing system, and subscription enforcement.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 403 when admin user is not properly associated with restaurant
Returns 403 for admin user not associated with restaurant

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns 403 but UI doesn't show proper error handling

passed_tests: Super Admin Dashboard - Overview with analytics (5 restaurants, 3 active, ₹6,597 MRR)
Super Admin Dashboard - Restaurant creation form
Super Admin Dashboard - Restaurant management (approve, suspend, extend)
Restaurant Registration flow (self-service with pending approval)
Restaurant Admin Dashboard - Menu management with ₹ pricing
Restaurant Admin Dashboard - Analytics with rupee currency
Billing Counter - Order display with ₹ amounts
Billing Counter - GST calculation (18%) ready for implementation
All currency displays consistently use rupee symbol (₹)
Super admin can create restaurants and manage subscriptions
Super admin can extend subscriptions (+30 days)
Restaurant registration requires super admin approval
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin user restaurant association issue - the admin@restaurant.com user needs to be properly linked to a restaurant with active subscription to enable staff management and subscription viewing features
